zone_section_end_before.title_label_raw: T ZONE: MOBILE HOME PARK ZONE

zone_class_reference.summary: U-2 is an established class of use zone.

permitted_uses.use_name: uses accessory to the foregoing uses

prohibitions.summary: No development for any purpose other than one or more of the uses set out in Subsection 53AA(1).
No land or building use in whole or in part for any purpose other than one or more of the uses set out in Subsection 53AA(1).

general_zone_controls.condition_text: In the area designated as Bedford Highway Area any U-2 use shall be set back a minimum of 50 feet from any property line that abuts a residential zone.

driveway_access_controls.condition_text: In the Bedford Highway Area one vehicle access point shall be permitted to the Highway from each lot with 100 feet of frontage or less and two vehicle access points shall be permitted for each lot with frontage greater than 100 feet.

For the purposes of Subsection 53AC(1), the vehicle access point shall not exceed 35 feet in width and shall be defined by curbing, planting or a similar device that will not obstruct the view of traffic.

spatial_features_needed.reason: controls the 50 foot abutting-residential setback and driveway access rules in Sections 53AB and 53AC
controls Section 53AB setback applicability where a U-2 property line abuts a residential zone
